name: 安装并配置 Claude Agent ACP
description: 安装 Zed 的 claude-agent-acp，并写入 QwenPaw 当前 workspace 的 ACP runner 配置，用于 delegate_external_agent 调用。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

RUNNER_NAME="{{runner_name}}"
INSTALL_METHOD="{{install_method}}"
VERSION="{{version}}"
WORKSPACE_DIR="{{workspace_dir}}"
PATCH_CONFIG="{{patch_qwenpaw_config}}"
ENABLE_DELEGATE_TOOL="{{enable_delegate_tool}}"
API_KEY="{{api_key}}"
API_KEY_ENV="{{api_key_env}}"
TOOL_PARSE_MODE="{{tool_parse_mode}}"
STDIO_LIMIT="{{stdio_buffer_limit_bytes}}"

if ! command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "ERROR: npm is required. Install Node.js/npm first." >&2
  exit 1
fi

PACKAGE="@zed-industries/claude-agent-acp"
COMMAND_NAME="claude-agent-acp"

if [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "global" ]]; then
  SPEC="$PACKAGE"
  if [[ -n "$VERSION" && "$VERSION" != "latest" ]]; then
    SPEC="${SPEC}@${VERSION}"
  fi
  echo "Installing Claude ACP agent globally: $SPEC"
  npm install -g "$SPEC"
  hash -r
  if ! command -v "$COMMAND_NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: $COMMAND_NAME command not found after npm install" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "Claude ACP command is available: $(command -v "$COMMAND_NAME")"
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "npx" ]]; then
  echo "Verifying npx can run $PACKAGE"
  echo "Configured npx command: npx -y $PACKAGE"
else
  echo "Skipping Claude ACP install because install_method=skip"
  if ! command -v "$COMMAND_NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: $COMMAND_NAME command not found. Choose install_method=global/npx or install the package first." >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "Claude ACP command is available: $(command -v "$COMMAND_NAME")"
fi

if [[ "$PATCH_CONFIG" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping QwenPaw agent.json patch because patch_qwenpaw_config=false"
  exit 0
fi

AGENT_JSON="$WORKSPACE_DIR/agent.json"
if [[ ! -f "$AGENT_JSON" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: agent.json not found: $AGENT_JSON" >&2
  exit 1
fi

BACKUP="$AGENT_JSON.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
cp -a "$AGENT_JSON" "$BACKUP"
echo "Backed up agent config: $BACKUP"

python3 - "$AGENT_JSON" "$RUNNER_NAME" "$INSTALL_METHOD" "$PACKAGE" "$COMMAND_NAME" "$API_KEY" "$API_KEY_ENV" "$TOOL_PARSE_MODE" "$STDIO_LIMIT" "$ENABLE_DELEGATE_TOOL" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

agent_json = Path(sys.argv[1])
runner_name = sys.argv[2]
install_method = sys.argv[3]
package = sys.argv[4]
command_name = sys.argv[5]
api_key = sys.argv[6]
api_key_env = sys.argv[7]
tool_parse_mode = sys.argv[8]
stdio_limit = sys.argv[9]
enable_delegate_tool = sys.argv[10]

if install_method == "npx":
    command = "npx"
    args = ["-y", package]
else:
    command = command_name
    args = []

env = {}
if api_key_env and api_key:
    env[api_key_env] = api_key

runner_cfg = {
    "enabled": True,
    "command": command,
    "args": args,
    "env": env,
    "trusted": True,
    "tool_parse_mode": tool_parse_mode,
    "stdio_buffer_limit_bytes": int(stdio_limit),
}

data = json.loads(agent_json.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
data.setdefault("acp", {}).setdefault("agents", {})[runner_name] = runner_cfg

if enable_delegate_tool == "true":
    data.setdefault("tools", {}).setdefault("agent", {}).setdefault("delegate_external_agent", {})
    data["tools"]["agent"]["delegate_external_agent"].update({
        "name": "delegate_external_agent",
        "enabled": True,
        "description": "Delegate work to an external ACP agent runner",
        "display_to_user": True,
        "async_execution": False,
        "icon": "📡",
        "config": {},
    })

agent_json.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
print(f"Configured ACP runner '{runner_name}' in {agent_json}")
if api_key:
    print(f"API key will be passed as env var {api_key_env}; the value is not printed.")
else:
    print("No API key env was written; make sure the runner can authenticate another way.")
print("Refresh QwenPaw or reopen the Workspace -> ACP page to use it.")
PY

version.label: npm 版本（留空或 latest 表示最新版）
